title: The Error
description: Adds an edible block with error texture.
body:
This Mod adds a new Block with an error texture and a ridiculously expensive and random Crafting Recipe. The Block item is also edible, restoring 50 hunger points so the materials of the Crafting Recipe are used well. Also just for fun the Block makes an anvil noise when placed.

Since the Recipe is so expensive and random you will unlikely use this block in survival. But could be funny in creative mode.

 

Either way i just made this mod out of Boredom so it wont really be used by anyone other than to joke.
